meaning: 1. to learn sth over again; 2. to review; 3. to brush up; 4. to revive
sentence: 周末她喜欢重温小时候看过的老电影。
pinyin: Zhōumò tā xǐhuān chóngwēn xiǎoshíhou kànguò de lǎo diànyǐng.
english: On weekends she likes to revisit old movies she watched as a child.

sentence: 书末附有详细的引得，方便查阅。
pinyin: Shū mò fù yǒu xiángxì de yǐndé, fāngbiàn cháyuè.
english: A detailed index is appended at the end of the book for easy reference.

sentence: 这个词意指一种特别的感情状态。
pinyin: Zhège cí yìzhǐ yī zhǒng tèbié de gǎnqíng zhuàngtài.
english: This word implies a particular emotional state.

sentence: 这部电影获得了观众的广泛赞誉。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng huòdéle guānzhòng de guǎngfàn zànyù.
english: This film received widespread praise from the audience.

meaning: 1. to increase sharply; 2. to rise dramatically
sentence: 最近这里的房价暴涨，很多人买不起了。
pinyin: Zuìjìn zhèlǐ de fángjià bàozhǎng, hěn duō rén mǎi bu qǐ le.
english: Housing prices here have surged recently and many people can no longer afford them.
